name: GOLFTEC Alexandria
address: 1506 Belle View Blvd Suite A, Alexandria, VA 22307
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf instruction and fitting center that combines expert coaching with advanced motion measurement tools. Their system utilizes high-speed video analysis, OPTIMOTION motion capture, and launch monitors to provide data-driven feedback on swings and club performance. Services include private lessons, club fittings, and practice memberships, all designed to help golfers improve their skills through personalized, measurable programs.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized improvement plans based on swing data and video analysis
Launch monitor technology provides detailed club and ball performance metrics
Expert PGA-certified coaches for tailored instruction and club fitting

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, GOLFTEC provides all necessary equipment and may recommend specific clubs based on your fitting or lesson needs.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue does not offer food or drink services, and there is no mention of a BYOB policy. It is recommended to check with the specific location for their policy on outside food and beverages.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC's facilities focus on instruction and practice with simulators. A full 18-hole simulation can typically take around 60-90 minutes depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC offers programs for juniors and youth, using technology to make golf instruction accessible and engaging for younger players.
